message:
fix: Implement real date formatting, SQLite value preparation, and system entropy

- sqlite3.zig: Implement adaptDate/adaptDatetime with proper ISO format output
- sqlite3.zig: Implement PrepareProtocol.prepare() for int/float/bool/string/null types
- secrets.zig: Implement getentropy() using std.crypto.random for OS entropy
- inspect.zig: Add AOT limitation documentation for getcomments()
